description: A great addition to your wardrobe, these Suede Archive shoes from puma come with luxurious suede uppers offering a great Fit and comfort. Team these with jeans and tees for those casual occasions when you want to look your best. Upper Premium suede leather upper for comfort and durability Upper stitched to the outsole for extended durability Lightly padded collar for comfort Stitch overlays to further add to the structure Synthetic formstripe logo detail Midsole Synthetic lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Gum-rubber outsole in waffle pattern for cushioning and grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
